title: DefectAreaExtended Property
description: Sets / gets whether to use edge results within the defect thresholds to extend the area of the defect.
notes:
When DefectAreaExtended is True, the system extends the defect area using edge results that are within the defect level thresholds on either side of the found defect.

Vision Objects: DefectAreaExtended Property
